response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse environments, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and German language proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this executive-level role requiring client advisory and compliance expertise.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Proven full-stack engineering across languages, platforms, and high-scale systems
Strong mentorship and workshop experience in TDD, CI/CD, and developer education
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic' — fails C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or requirements management experience
Lacks documented team leadership or project oversight at executive/managerial level
